final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] init_val,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= init_val;  // Synchronous reset to initial value
        end else begin
            q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};  // Shift left
        end
    end

endmodule
